# Pranith Jain · Security Portfolio

> Security analyst working threat intel, email defense, and security automation. Ships a free 60+ tool DFIR toolkit and a live, self-updating threat-intel platform. One Cloudflare Workers deploy, edge-cached, no signup, no API key.

## What is this site?

A three-surface security portfolio hosted at https://pranithjain.qzz.io:

1. **Portfolio** (`/`, `/about`, `/skills`, `/experience`, `/projects`, `/blog`) — background, focus areas, and case studies.
2. **DFIR Toolkit** (`/dfir/*`) — 60+ browser-side analyst tools across 11 categories: IOC & hash checks, phishing analysis, CVE prioritization, detection rule conversion (Sigma to KQL to SPL to YARA to EQL to Lucene to DLP to supply-chain), email defense, malware analysis, cloud/IAM, STIX/TAXII, and an autonomous case-study blog.
3. **Threat Intel Platform** (`/threatintel/*`) — live CTI: ransomware activity tracking, actor timelines, dark-web/forum monitoring, CVE/KEV merge, Telegram/Reddit firehoses, daily auto-generated briefings broadcast to a Telegram channel.

Everything is free, edge-cached, and requires no signup. Built on React + Vite + TypeScript + Cloudflare Workers.

## Who is it for?

- SOC analysts and detection engineers triaging IOCs, phishing, or CVEs
- Threat intel researchers tracking ransomware activity, actor TTPs, or dark-web chatter
- Email security operators investigating BEC, spoofing, or DMARC/SPF/DKIM failures
- Security hiring managers and conference organizers evaluating a practitioner's work

## Key Features

- 60+ free DFIR tools — triage, OSINT, email security, detection engineering, AI security, data security, cloud security, API security, STIX/TAXII workbench
- Live CTI platform — 30+ intel sources merged with consensus scoring, ransomware negotiation tracking, dark-web monitoring
- Universal rule converter — round-trips Sigma, KQL, SPL, Lucene, EQL, YARA, DLP, and supply-chain rules through one canonical RuleIR
- Autonomous case-study blog — discover to QA to publish pipeline producing postmortems and DFIR walkthroughs
- Hourly CTI digests broadcast to a Telegram channel
- Browser-side execution — most tools run client-side; sensitive enrichments hit thin edge APIs

## Pricing

Free. No signup. No API key required. No tracking beyond standard Cloudflare request logs. Server costs are absorbed; donations accepted via the `/sponsor` page.

## Attribution

- Person: Pranith Jain
- Employer: Qubit Capital
- Framework: React 18 + Vite 6 + TypeScript 5, served as a Cloudflare Worker
- Hosting: Cloudflare (edge cache + KV + D1 + Durable Objects)
- Standards: HTML5, CSS3, ES2020+, JSON-LD (schema.org)
